index.descripcion: Master data that feeds the rest of Agimav: people, suppliers, operational structure and units of measure.
index.auditHint: Lists are master data: the values you choose here appear in the selectors across Inventory, Purchasing, Machinery and Maintenance. Deactivate (instead of delete) to preserve history.

descripciones.usuarios: People with access to the system. Invite, assign roles and manage onboarding and offboarding.
descripciones.roles: Access profiles that group permissions for each area of the system.
descripciones.proveedores: Companies that supply parts, services and fuel. Used in purchasing and receptions.
descripciones.localidades: Cities and regions where Agimav operates. Used in suppliers and production units.

descripciones.tiposUnidad: Classification of production units: road works, quarry, logistics base, etc.
descripciones.unidadesMedida: Units used by inventory items: liters, kilos, units, meters.
